q: ABC Inc. has a host of servers, each serving a different purpose. Almost all are critical. Most servers were virtualized with backup virtual components. When one server's memory crashed mid-day, operations were unaffected as it switched to backup virtual memory. What is such a feature called?
note: 自動切換到備援、零中斷 = Fault Tolerance。HA 容許短暫中斷，FT 是無縫切換。

q: Zoe's site crashed under high traffic. She bought two more servers and distributed the load across three servers to maximize efficiency. Which solution did she use?
note: 分散流量負載 = Load Balancing。

q: Which of the following services provides mail and calendar services?
note: ⚠️ PDF標B錯誤。郵件與行事曆服務 = Microsoft Exchange Server。Application Server 與此無關。

q: Seth wants an approximate picture of risk likelihood (earthquake unlikely, fire high, intrusion partly controlled by guards) to prioritize mitigation. What kind of risk assessment is Seth conducting?
note: 用 high/low 等級描述但帶近似程度判斷 = Semi-Qualitative。

q: Which term defines the assessment of risk factors and the relationship between these factors?
note: 風險因子及其關係 = Risk Models。

q: Richard backs up daily at 8pm. Fire at 9am destroyed servers. Transfer from alternate site takes 8 hours. Based on last backup, recovery time is 'minus 13 hours'. What term defines this 13-hour period?
note: 資料遺失量(回到上次備份點)= RPO。

q: Jess wants to implement the standard for societal security in the business continuity management system. Which standard should she implement?
note: BCMS 社會安全標準 = ISO 22301。

q: John wants the alternate site to run in parallel to the primary, allowing near-immediate continuity. Which site is best suited?
note: 平行運作、立即接手 = Hot Site。

q: Katie implemented the RAID level that splits data into blocks and writes evenly across drives but provides no redundancy. This RAID requires a minimum of ___ drives.
note: RAID 0 striping，最少 2 顆。

q: Jill wants an analysis to decide if her food truck business would be profitable in monetary terms. Which analysis was she advised to conduct?
note: 評估投資是否有利可圖 = Cost Benefit Analysis。

q: XYZ.com (London) lost a hosting server. Admins solved slowness by routing traffic to the alternate server in Mumbai. What term best describes this?
note: 跨地理位置(倫敦→孟買)分流 = Global Load Balancing。

q: Which technology is used to create a copy of data on one server on another server?
note: 伺服器間複製資料 = Data Replication。

q: Which team is responsible for the implementation and execution of the disaster recovery plan, including test plans?
note: 執行 DRP 與測試計畫 = Operations Team。

q: Many choose this backup method to protect against site-specific problems; location can be a home office or a disaster-hardened bunker. Which backup method?
note: 異地存放備份媒體 = Offsite。

q: Nancy needs RAID with parity stored across multiple drives, reconstruction during downtime, good speed, and not expensive. Which RAID level?
note: 專屬同位元(dedicated parity)、成本低 = RAID 3。

q: James set aside $20,000 emergency fund for a virtual-connection DR service. What is this emergency fund called?

opts.B: Risk Adjusted Return on Risk Adjusted Capital (RARORAC)

note: EDRP官方標RAROC(風險調整後的資本準備)。

q: Which is NOT a component of a centralized governance structure for Business Continuity and Risk Management?
note: 治理結構三要素為 Programs/Practices、Enablement、Effectiveness。Authenticity 不屬於。

q: Amy mimicked a real-life disaster, testing software, communication, procedures and personnel. Which test?
note: 模擬真實災難情境但不真正中斷營運 = Simulation Testing。

q: Which standard on disaster/emergency management & BC programs defines disasters and covers prevention, mitigation, preparedness, response, continuity, and recovery?
note: NFPA 1600 是緊急/災害管理與BC的美國標準。

q: Which server category stores host account info and implements security policies in its domain?
note: 管理帳戶與網域安全政策 = Domain Controller。

q: Timothy implements a dedicated network for sharing storage resources, separating storage units from servers/user network. He uses a ___.
note: 專用儲存網路、區塊級 = SAN。

q: Jack on Hyper-V wants a snapshot backup instead of full backup of VMs. Which native Hyper-V Manager feature?
note: EDRP官方標 Snapshots Backup(新版Hyper-V稱Checkpoint，但題庫答案為D)。

q: Which term refers to the individual skills required to ensure achievement of terminal objectives?
note: 達成終端目標所需的個別技能 = Enabling Objectives。

q: Matt created several logical servers on one physical server. Which technology?
note: 一台實體切多台邏輯伺服器 = Virtualization。

q: Will sets up a pair of RAID disks so all data written to one is auto-copied to the other. Which RAID level?
note: 鏡像 = RAID 1。

q: Zane finds one server's Active Directory missing; all other domain servers have AD intact. Which restoration process?
note: 其他DC正常，靠複寫還原 = Non-Authoritative Restoration。

q: Which strategy is NOT part of risk response?
note: 風險回應策略為 Avoid/Mitigate/Transfer(Share)/Accept。Safety 不是。

q: Cameron's software created a copy of data using block level imaging. Which software/method?
note: ⚠️ PDF標C(Virtualization)錯誤。題目明寫 block level imaging = Disk Imaging。

q: Which refers to a central command and control facility responsible for recovery actions, coordinating response/resources, ensuring coherence of operations?
note: 中央指揮控制設施 = Emergency Operations Center。

q: Annabeth (web-hosting, no downtime affordable) opted for live replication at the backup site for immediate switchover. Which backup site?
note: 即時複寫、立即接手 = Hot Site。

q: Fred wants a plan of well-planned actions before, during, and after a catastrophic event. Which plan?
note: 災前/中/後的IT行動 = IT Disaster Recovery Plan。

q: Which technique verifies data is safe, secure, and readable after update, restore, or retrieve?
note: ⚠️ PDF標D(Consolidation,整併)錯誤。驗證資料在更新/還原/取回後完整可讀 = Database Integrity Testing。

q: In which test is the entire BCP implemented?
note: 完整實施整個BCP = Full-Scale Test。

q: ABC Bank distributes client data chunks across global centers; a % deviation between actual and targeted data should not exist. Which recovery metric defines this % deviation?
note: ⚠️ PDF標D錯誤。實際與目標資料的偏差百分比(一致性) = Recovery Consistency Objective(RCO)。RLS 是地點範圍，與偏差%無關。

q: Jonathan classified risks as Very Low/Low/Medium/High/Very High. Which assessment method?
note: 純等級描述、無數值 = Qualitative。

q: Which term refers to systems that maintain data and access despite malicious/accidental problems with storage servers, networks, clients, and accounts?
note: 面對攻擊/故障仍可存取 = Survivable Storage System。

q: Kelly backs up only files created/modified after the last backup. What type?
note: 自上次任何備份後的變更 = Incremental。

q: Which term refers to a set of tasks organizations must continue throughout or resume rapidly after a disruptive incident?
note: EDRP官方標 BIA(此題官方答案為A，雖然MEF更貼近字面定義，但題庫答案為A)。

q: Jack rents a server in the same data center his friend uses; cheaper, provides cooling. Which backup site?
note: 共用資料中心、租用機位 = Colocation。

q: Rachel wants a DR tier that backs up data over a WAN connection. Which tier?
note: 透過WAN備份(電子保險庫) = Tier 3。

q: Which method keeps the SYSVOL folder synchronized across multiple servers in the same domain?
note: SYSVOL 同步 = DFS Replication (DFSR)。

q: Lisa wants to cut cost of many idle dedicated servers, optimize resources, save cooling energy. Which solution?
note: 整併多台伺服器降成本 = Server Virtualization。

q: Rick interconnected individual computers and removed the central server to balance load. Which architecture?
note: 去中心、電腦互連分攤 = Peer-to-Peer。

q: Which term refers to a storage system of HDDs that looks and acts like a physical tape library?
note: 硬碟模擬磁帶櫃 = VTL。

q: Which is NOT an advantage of colocation facilities?
note: Colocation 不提供伺服器復原服務。

q: IT dept copies data changes from original to replica DB server annually (DB updated once/year). Which solution?
note: ⚠️ PDF標C(Merge)錯誤。低頻率、整批複製當下快照 = Snapshot Replication。Merge是雙向合併變更，不符年度單向複製情境。

q: Match the RAID components with their functions (1-iii etc.). [配對表PDF未印出選項內容]
note: ⚠️ 配對對照表(i~v)PDF未提供，無法獨立驗證，沿用官方答案B。

q: Joan's DR test had team members confirm effectiveness, bottlenecks, weaknesses in the plan. Which test?
note: 團隊逐步檢視找弱點 = Walkthrough Testing。

q: When information availability increases in PASIS architecture, which feature decreases?
note: PASIS 中可用性↑則機密性↓(分散副本越多越易洩)。

q: XYZ Inc. transfers critical data to backup site via an FTP server. Which term best describes this?

opts.D: Manually copying the data files and transferring them to the remote site

note: 電子化批次傳送到異地保險庫 = Electronic Vaulting。

q: Which term refers to the ease with which technicians can resolve or replace failing components/systems?
note: 易於修復/更換 = Reparability。

q: Jack set up BCP training for employees with small roles, covering framework/processes/strategies. What is this training?
note: 角色輕、概觀介紹 = Introductory Awareness Training。

q: Jonah's laptop creates a new backup daily, each taking more space than the previous. Which backup type?
note: ⚠️ PDF標D錯誤。每天備份且容量逐日遞增=自上次完整備份後累積變更 = Differential Backup。Incremental每次只備變更，容量不會持續變大。

q: Jonas took measures to avoid/minimize cyclone damage before it hit. Under which classification?
note: 事前避免/減損 = Prevention。

q: Which DR test is very expensive and disrupts normal business operations?
note: 真正中斷營運、最貴 = Full Interruption Testing。

q: Gloria's BCP audit stage ascertained whether operational resiliency/continuity was encouraged and if BCP was over/underfunded. Which audit stage?
note: 資金與整體治理 = Overall Program Governance。

q: Emma's scenario training phase: participants informed in advance about training. Which phase?
note: 事前通知參與者 = Warning Phase。

q: Which term measures the severity of the impact of a risk on a business?
note: EDRP官方標 Assessment Scale。

q: Alan backs up 3-4 articles daily; backup time = downtime, wants it quick. Which backup suits?
note: ⚠️ PDF標A錯誤。每日少量、要最快/最省時 = Incremental Backup(只備當天3-4篇變更)。Differential會越備越久。

q: Which term refers to the system's ability to correctly serve the requests it receives?
note: 正確服務請求的能力 = Availability。

q: George identifies risks (phishing, earthquakes, server crash, electrical surges) and must prioritize per an InfoSec risk management standard. Which standard?
note: ⚠️ PDF標D(ISO 27031是ICT就緒)疑誤。資訊安全『風險管理』標準 = ISO/IEC 27005。題目明指 information security risk management。建議改B。(註:部分EDRP題庫標D，存在爭議，以官方ISO定義B較正確)

q: Phil's VM crashed during experiment; he had a method taking backups at intervals giving an architectural instance of last saved VM. Which method?
note: VM定期存點、還原到上次架構狀態 = Snapshot。

q: Standard providing a framework to identify/specify all aspects for improving ICT readiness for business continuity. Which standard?
note: ICT readiness for business continuity = ISO 27031。

q: Phoebe's DR test cases need at least 90% to pass for success. What is this scenario known as?
note: 通過門檻(完成標準) = Exit Criteria。

q: Name of the shared directory in Microsoft Server OS containing copy of commonly shared/replicated public files of a domain?
note: 網域公用共享複寫目錄 = SYSVOL。

q: Using which Windows 10 feature can users preserve system state including system files, installed apps, and settings?
note: 保存系統狀態/還原點 = System Restore。

q: Which cluster provides consistent file system images across servers, allowing simultaneous read/write to a single shared file system?
note: 共享檔案系統同時讀寫 = Storage Cluster。

q: In PASIS, after implementation critical data was only accessible to authorized employees. Which PASIS feature?
note: 僅授權者可存取 = Confidentiality。

q: Jonathan used a DR component containing a pictorial representation of all DR processes. Which DR component?
note: 流程圖示說明 = System Description。

q: Which term refers to a high-speed data transmission technique providing access to consolidated block-level storage?
note: 高速、區塊級整合儲存 = SAN。

q: Which term refers to storage tech used to capture real-time data changes and facilitate restore points and recovery?
note: 即時捕捉變更、連續還原點 = CDP。

q: Archie tested the BCP by mobilizing the resources. Which test?
note: 實際動員資源 = Functional Test。

q: Joanna's software backs up/restores/recovers DB files using database server sessions. Which software?
note: Oracle Recovery Manager = RMAN。

q: Which term refers to the recommencement of business functions as systems are gradually made available after a disaster?
note: 逐步恢復營運 = Resume。

q: Jake's plan identifies all personnel accountable for research, development, and implementation of the DRP. Which plan?
note: 指派人員職責 = Disaster Management Plan。

q: Tom wants centralized storage with free data backup on the server, efficient backup/recovery. Which storage tech?
note: 集中式檔案級網路儲存 = NAS。

q: Where can the VM Management Service be located in the Hyper-V architecture?
note: VMMS 位於 Parent Partition。

q: Which sub-team assigns research and carries out development/implementation of the DRP throughout the organization?
note: EDRP官方標 Chairpersons。

q: Fred's site inaccessible; hosting files on server corrupted. Which server must he restore?
note: 網站託管 = IIS Server。

q: Which term refers to a programming pattern where computers are clustered in a distributed and parallel fashion?
note: ⚠️ PDF標A錯誤。分散且平行叢集運算 = Grid Computing。Decentralized是架構概念，Grid才是『分散+平行叢集』的標準定義。(註:此題EDRP官方答案存爭議，依字面定義改C)

q: Which term refers to a backup taken when the database is offline?
note: DB離線時備份 = Cold Backup。

q: James (PASIS) recovered data from earthquake-destroyed storage nodes. Which PASIS feature allowed recovery?
note: 節點毀損仍能還原 = Durability。

q: Company wants a backup method that encrypts data, accessible anytime/anywhere. Which method?
note: 加密+隨時隨地存取 = Cloud Backup。

q: Fred installed generator, mail malware/spam protection, and 8-hr backup to mitigate two risks. Which process did Fred go through?
note: 實際採取控制措施降風險 = Risk Mitigation。

q: Which term measures the number of applications/data sets handled by the recovery solution and max data size it can store?
note: 處理量與容量規模 = Recovery Service Scalability。

q: Which components does PASIS architecture integrate?

opts.A: Centralized Computing, Data Redundancy and Encoding
opts.B: Centralized Storage Systems, Deduplication and Mirroring
opts.C: Decentralized Storage Systems, Data Redundancy and Encoding, and Dynamic Self-Maintenance
opts.D: Distributed Computing, Data Redundancy and Encoding, and Dynamic Self-Maintenance

note: PASIS = 去中心儲存+冗餘編碼+動態自我維護。

q: Which term refers to the ability to restore data and applications should data centers/servers/infrastructure get damaged by a disaster?
note: 災後還原資料與應用 = Disaster Recovery。

q: Betting site: payment gateway down >1hr loses $100k+15%; might lose 25% permanently. Unacceptable, fixed immediately. What term defines this two-hour period?
note: 絕對不可超過的最大中斷時間 = MTPOD。

q: Jane wants a standard guiding establishment/implementation/maintenance of a formal documented BIA process. Which standard?
note: BIA 程序專用標準 = ISO/TS 22317。

q: Which term refers to a virtualized data storage and processing facility provided as a service?
note: 虛擬化的資料中心即服務 = Software Defined Data Center。

q: Which term refers to a dedicated server also used for file storage and sharing?
note: 專用檔案儲存共享伺服器 = NAS。(PDF此處格式黏到Q92，已分離)

q: Martin wants to back up Cisco Router config to an FTP server. Which Cisco IOS CLI command?
note: copy running-config 到 ftp = copy ... ftp。

q: Jason notices slow VM data transmission due to poor VMQ handling from NIC restrictions. What should he do?

opts.A: Improve the performance of the network storage
opts.C: Increase the bandwidth of the network connection

note: VMQ/NIC問題 = 更新NIC驅動。

q: Remy invested $15,000; 15% fail chance rising to 35% after fire-safety inspection. Which method of evaluating risk?
note: 以機率估算潛在損失 = Value at Risk。

q: Which term refers to repairing the old site or setting up a new alternate site to resume operations after a disaster?
note: 修復原址/建新址 = Restoration。

q: Lily's archiving method provides tools/software, easy access/cataloging, but recurring cooling & maintenance costs. Which archiving method?
note: 本地、有冷卻維護經常性成本 = On-Premise Disk Based Archiving。

q: Hospital ER needs zero-minute downtime; secondary server takes over automatically the second primary goes down (coordinated). Which solution?
note: 自動接管 = Failover。

q: Which term refers to a client-server architecture merged with layered architecture?
note: ⚠️ PDF標C錯誤。Client-server + 分層 = N-Tier Architecture。Tightly Coupled與分層架構無關。

q: Which term refers to the potential gain from the best alternative forgone when choosing between mutually exclusive alternatives?
note: ⚠️ PDF標A錯誤。放棄的最佳替代方案之潛在收益 = Opportunity Cost(機會成本)的標準定義。

q: Jack updated macOS to a buggy beta; wants to restore to previous OS version. Which MacBook feature?
note: macOS 備份還原 = Time Machine。

q: Which is a feature of mainframe computers?
note: 大型主機特性 = Proven Reliability。

q: Which term refers to backing up files modified/changed/added since the last full backup?
note: 自上次『完整』備份後變更 = Differential。

q: Which term refers to evaluation of potential interruptions in a department's working due to failure of their internal systems?
note: 單一部門/分支層級 = Branch-wide BIA。

q: John wants RAID requiring minimum six drives for high fault tolerance and high read/write speed. Which RAID level?
note: 最少6顆、高容錯+高速 = RAID 50。

q: Which term refers to determining the potential impact of disruptive events on an organization's business processes?
note: ⚠️ PDF標D錯誤。判斷干擾事件對業務流程的潛在衝擊 = Business Impact Analysis(BIA)的定義。

q: Which term refers to third-party services like recovery infrastructure, real-time remote backup, and offsite replication?
note: 第三方代管DR = Managed Disaster Recovery。

q: Which training is meant for employees who have an important execution role in the BCP, provided framework/processes/strategies?
note: 重要執行角色、深入 = Detailed Awareness Training。

q: Mike needs to install a feature in Windows Server 2012 to enable backup/restore of a file server. Which feature via which app?

opts.C: Windows Server Backup, Microsoft Management Console

note: Windows Server Backup 功能，經 MMC 安裝。

q: Which term refers to training milestones that must be achieved to meet the BC training program's aim?
note: 訓練最終里程碑 = Terminal Objectives。

q: Which DR tier makes use of point in time copies?
note: 時間點副本 = Tier 4。

q: Polly estimates magnitude of damage if new product specs leaked (could lose $200k+, > upgrade cost, so upgrades). Which risk factor did she estimate?
note: 估算損害量級 = Impact。

q: Which term refers to the blueprint that calls out the tactics dictating how continuity and recovery from a disaster will be achieved?
note: 戰術藍圖 = Business Continuity Strategy。

q: Sam (Ubuntu) accidentally deleted official project files but had a backup. Which native Ubuntu option to recover?
note: Ubuntu 內建備份工具 = Déjà Dup。

q: Which option must be considered by an organization when conducting BIA?

opts.A: Transferring a business activity to a third-party
opts.C: Establishing alternate processes or creating redundancy/spare capacity in processes
opts.D: Ceasing or changing a business activity if viable alternatives are available

note: EDRP官方標 C(建立備援/冗餘流程)。

q: Phil's DR tier provided automated recovery of data and applications. Which DR tier?
note: 全自動化還原 = Tier 7。

q: Which is NOT an objective of business impact analysis?

opts.A: Identify RTO and RPO for Each Process
opts.B: Assess the Impact Caused by a Threat
opts.C: Identify the Critical Resources Required by the Business
opts.D: Establish the Recovery Order of the Critical Business Functions

note: EDRP官方標 D(建立復原順序非BIA本身目標)。

q: XYZ messaging app: secondary server can only take load for 4 hours; primary must be up within 4 hours. What term defines this 4-hour period?
note: 系統須在X時間內恢復 = RTO。

q: Which term refers to bringing a system's application and data back to a previous state in a prescribed, acceptable time frame?
note: 還原到先前狀態 = System Recovery。

q: Vulnerability assessment steps: (a) assess impact (b) estimate probability (c) assess resources to mitigate (d) list threats. Correct order?
note: 先列威脅d→估機率b→評衝擊a→評資源c。

q: Oliver's team's proposal leaked to competitor; lost project, morale dropped, other projects delayed for 2 months. Which impact best describes this?
note: EDRP官方標 C(混合可量化財損與士氣等非量化) = Semi-Qualitative。

q: The internal audit of the BCP takes place to ensure conformance to which standard?
note: BCMS 認證稽核標準 = ISO 22301:2012。

q: Matt (stock brokering, real-time updates) cannot have downtime to back up. Which backup technique?
note: DB線上運行中備份 = Hot Backup。

q: Jack connected computers/servers into a single unified computing resource, protecting against application/server/software/site failures. Which solution?
note: 整合成單一運算資源、多重防護 = Server Clustering。

q: Which term refers to a graphical representation of data protection services designed to balance overall cost of data protection against loss?
note: 資料保護成本平衡光譜圖 = Data Protection Continuum。

q: Which term refers to utilizing a full backup of a file then modifying it with one or more incremental backups?
note: 完整備份+增量合成 = Synthetic Backup。

q: Roger's test simulated a specific event scenario in which the BCP would be tested. Which test?
note: EDRP官方標 Tabletop Test(桌上推演特定情境)。

q: Joan's server slowed under traffic spike eating memory; she added extra virtual memory to smooth it. What is such a feature called?
note: 按需擴充資源 = Scalability。

q: Which cluster uses mounted file systems to read and write data?
note: EDRP官方標 High-Availability Cluster。

q: Which three components define the three-tier architecture in decentralized computing?

opts.C: Client, Application Server, and Database Server

note: ⚠️ PDF標A錯誤。三層式架構 = Client(展示層)+Application Server(邏輯層)+Database Server(資料層)。選項A的Peer-to-Peer不屬於三層架構。

q: Mia's computer destroyed in fire; IT used backups to restore a fresh laptop (no OS) to old state, automated, quick. Which data recovery method?
note: ⚠️ PDF標A錯誤。裸機(無OS無軟體)自動還原到完整狀態 = Bare Metal Recovery。System Restore只還原系統設定，不適用全新裸機。

q: Which term refers to any circumstance with the potential to disrupt or degrade the quality of operations or asset?
note: 具破壞潛力的情況 = Threat。

q: Which term refers to a collection of historical records selected for long-term retention and future reference?
note: 長期保存歷史紀錄 = Data Archiving。

q: Which technical process provides additional security to VMs by disabling unnecessary interfaces, devices, ports, and services?
note: ⚠️ PDF標B錯誤。停用不必要介面/埠/服務 = Hardening(強化)的標準定義。Restriction of Physical Access是實體存取限制，與停用服務無關。

q: Which virtualization method requires software called containers or virtual engines to run?
note: 容器/虛擬引擎 = OS-based(作業系統層)虛擬化。

q: Which term refers to the delay experienced by a system while it is serving a request?
note: 服務請求的延遲 = Latency。

q: Matt cannot boot Windows Server 2012 after OS update; boot manager files corrupted. Which command in System Recovery?
note: 修復開機管理員 = Bootrec /RebuildBCD。

q: Employees create individual backups of same data, wasting storage/bandwidth, risk of leak. What can be done?
note: 消除重複資料 = Deduplication。

q: What is the main objective of a BC test plan?

opts.A: To demonstrate proficiency in management response and crisis conditions
opts.B: Not threaten the normal business operations of an organization
opts.C: To diverge from the test storyboard to include unplanned events or circumstances
opts.D: To ensure the plan is accurate and relevant under adverse circumstances

note: ⚠️爭議題。EDRP官方答案標B(測試不應威脅正常營運)。字面上D更貼近『主要目標』，但官方答案為B，以官方為準。

q: When information confidentiality increases in PASIS architecture, what else also increases as a direct result?
note: 機密性↑(更多編碼/分片)則儲存需求↑。

q: In which scenario training phase is a debrief conducted with participants to obtain more feedback?
note: 事後檢討回饋 = Review Phase。

q: Which is a virtualization standard specified by the Distributed Management Task Force (DMTF)?
note: DMTF 虛擬化標準 = OVF。

q: Which refers to a moveable operating environment that can be set up at any place on transportable units?
note: 可移動的運作環境 = Mobile Recovery Center。

q: In which DR tier is data backed up with a hot site?
note: EDRP官方標 Tier 2(熱站備份)。

q: Which statement should a DR coordinator interviewee use to get the post?

opts.A: Day-to-day management control over the execution and maintenance of the disaster recovery program
opts.B: Responsible for the specification and design of all technology-based disaster recovery solutions
opts.C: Executive authority over the disaster recovery program
opts.D: Responsible for disaster recovery planning verification and compliance

note: DR協調者=日常執行與維護管理控制 = A。

q: Which layer of the Recovery Management Model provides hassle-free recovery and controls data protection technologies like replication and backup?
note: 統一管理還原與保護技術 = Common Management Layer。

q: Remus deleted VM snapshots to free host storage but space wasn't freed. What can he do?

opts.B: Shut down or restart the virtual machine system
opts.D: Delete the child disk of the snapshots present in the host machine

note: EDRP官方標 B(重啟VM系統以完成合併釋放空間)。

q: James's hard drive irreversibly damaged, data unreadable/inaccessible. What type of data loss?
note: 硬體實體損壞 = Physical loss。

q: Which term refers to a holistic management process identifying potential threats and impacts, providing a framework for organizational resilience?
note: 整體韌性管理框架 = Business Continuity Management(ISO 22301定義)。

q: Which term refers to applying strategies to help an organization deal with a sudden and significant undesirable event?
note: 應對突發重大事件 = Crisis Management。

q: Which is also known as the doomsday recovery level in 3DR?
note: 3DR 最末層(末日復原) = Archiving of Data。

q: Which term refers to the practice of bringing systems/applications/data back to 'normal' conditions in a prescribed, acceptable time frame?
note: 恢復到正常狀態的實務 = Recovery Management。

q: Craig can afford a few days' downtime; pre-installs hardware and pre-configures restoration at backup site to meet RTO. Which backup site?
note: 預裝硬體、部分配置、數天內可用 = Warm Site。

q: Which is NOT a component of BIA?
note: Safety 不屬於 BIA 組成元素。
